name: World Map Dot Plot
description: World map with four highlighted dot locations — North America, Europe, Asia, Africa

fields.TITLE_TEXT: Title above map, e.g. 'GLOBAL ATTACK ORIGINS'
fields.MAP_LABEL_1: Label for North America dot, e.g. 'United States'
fields.MAP_LABEL_2: Label for Europe dot, e.g. 'Eastern Europe'
fields.MAP_LABEL_3: Label for Asia dot, e.g. 'North Korea'
fields.MAP_LABEL_4: Label for Africa dot, e.g. 'West Africa'
